texto: Why not let people differ about their answers to the great mysteries of the Universe? Let each seek one's own way to the highest, to one's own sense of supreme loyalty in life, one's ideal of life. Let each philosophy, each world-view bring forth its truth and beauty to a larger perspective, that people may grow in vision, stature and dedication.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Algernon Black que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Why not let people differ about their answers to the great mysteries of the Universe? Let each se…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, happiness, people, com foco em reflexao.
